human_readable_rule: Low-risk procurement requires operational owner review and finance confirmation before handoff.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not approve, reject, block, punish, or execute any institutional action.

human_readable_rule: Medium-value procurement requires finance review and legal review before handoff when contractual references exist.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not issue legal conclusions, donor compliance conclusions, payment decisions, supplier sanctions, or enforcement actions.

human_readable_rule: High-value procurement requires finance, legal, and management board review before execution readiness or institutional handoff.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not approve procurement, block procurement, or replace management authority.

human_readable_rule: Critical procurement requires finance review, legal review, and executive review before institutional handoff. Emergency override may be reviewed only when documented.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not authorize emergency execution or replace executive responsibility.

human_readable_rule: Low-risk grant expense requires program review and finance confirmation before handoff.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not issue donor compliance conclusions or payment authorization.

human_readable_rule: Medium-risk grant expense requires program review, finance review, and supporting document review before handoff.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not approve donor reporting, block payments, or certify compliance.

human_readable_rule: High-risk grant expense requires program review, finance review, management review, and supporting document review before institutional handoff.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not issue donor compliance conclusions or replace institutional approval.

human_readable_rule: Medium consulting request requires finance and legal review before handoff because consulting arrangements may create contractual or budget exposure.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not interpret law or authorize consulting engagement.

human_readable_rule: High-value consulting request requires finance, legal, and management board review before execution readiness.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not approve consulting work, block work, or issue legal conclusions.

human_readable_rule: High-risk legal service request requires legal owner review, finance review, and management approval before handoff.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not provide legal advice or legal conclusions.

human_readable_rule: Partnership request requires domain owner review and legal review before activation or institutional handoff.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not approve partnerships or replace authorized signatories.

human_readable_rule: High-risk partnership request requires research, finance, legal, and management review before institutional handoff.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not authorize public institution collaboration or external commitments.

human_readable_rule: Emergency override requires finance review, legal review where possible, executive override record, documented reason, and post-event human review.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not authorize emergency action or validate override legality.

human_readable_rule: Any high-value request above 100000 PLN requires finance review and management board review before readiness can be accepted.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not block action or approve spending.

human_readable_rule: Any critical request above 200000 PLN requires finance, legal, and executive review before institutional handoff.
verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only. It does not authorize execution, legal approval, or payment.
